rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption. Fam. Code §58.101 defines terms for juvenile justice information systems. The two provisions govern unrelated subject matter and share no operative overlap.
quote: "Criminal justice agency" has the meaning assigned by Section 411.082, Government Code.
_note: No conflict: proposed Tax Code change is unrelated to Fam. Code §58.101 juvenile justice definitions.
